TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_trv_Muhammadu_Buhari, title = Muhammadu_Buhari, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Seediq]}, url = {https://trv.wikipedia.org/wiki/Muhammadu_Buhari} }

S.FORM: = Muhammadu Buhari = Mntucing hngkawas 1942 idas 12 jiyax 17 ka Muhammadu Buhari ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Nigeria ta sayang o kiya ka Muhammadu Buhari, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 5 jiyax 29 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = muħammadu buħaɾi = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka muħammadu buħaɾi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan nigəɾia ta sajaŋ o kija ka muħammadu buħaɾi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
S.FORM: = Muhammadu Buhari = Mntucing hngkawas 1942 idas 12 jiyax 17 ka Muhammadu Buhari ga, empklaw ka hiya. Bukung klwaan Nigeria ta sayang o kiya ka Muhammadu Buhari, pnaah hngkawas 2015 idas 5 jiyax 29 pnrajing kmlawa klwaan.
S.PHON: = muħammadu buħaɾi = mntuʦiŋ ħŋkawas **** idas ** ɟijax ** ka muħammadu buħaɾi ga, əmpklaw ka ħija. bukuŋ klwaan nigəɾia ta sajaŋ o kija ka muħammadu buħaɾi, pnaaħ ħŋkawas **** idas * ɟijax ** pnɾaɟiŋ kmlawa klwaan.
